name: Borin Vance

race.name: Human
race.description: Found throughout the multiverse, humans are as varied as they are numerous, and they endeavor to achieve as much as they can in the years they are given. Their ambition and resourcefulness are commended, respected, and feared on many worlds.
traits: Size: Medium (about 4–7 feet tall) or Small (about 2–4 feet tall), chosen when you select this species (defaults to Medium for now).
Resourceful: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.
Skillful: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice (chosen during character creation).
Versatile: You gain an Origin feat of your choice.

class.name: Fighter
class.description: Masters of combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Regain hit points as a bonus action.

fightingStyles.name: Archery
fightingStyles.description: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

fightingStyles.name: Defense
fightingStyles.description: +1 bonus to AC while wearing armor.

fightingStyles.name: Dueling
fightingStyles.description: +2 damage with a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapon.

fightingStyles.name: Great Weapon Fighting
fightingStyles.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice with two-handed melee weapons.

fightingStyles.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
fightingStyles.description: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

class.statRecommendationDetails: Prioritize Strength (for heavy weapons/armor) OR Dexterity (for finesse/ranged weapons). Constitution is vital for hit points. Choose based on your intended combat style and selected Fighting Style.

MainHand.name: Greatsword
MainHand.description: A heavy two-handed martial blade for powerful sweeping strikes.

Torso.name: Chain Mail
Torso.description: Interlocking metal rings. AC 16. Disadvantage on Stealth checks.

selectedFightingStyle.name: Great Weapon Fighting
selectedFightingStyle.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice with two-handed melee weapons.

visualDescription: A high fantasy character portrait of a level 1 Human Fighter. Male adventurer. Head-and-shoulders, detailed, dramatic lighting, neutral background.
